channel.title: Enigma Writeups
channel.copyright: Made with 🧠 and ☕ by Enigma | CC BY-NC 4.0

item.title: GitBad | Web – L3ak CTF
item.author: mohamedmasmoudi745@gmail.com (Mohamed Masmoudi)
item.description: This is my write-up for GitBad one of the web challenges in L3ak CTF. It walks through exploiting an SSRF via Git submodule URLs, bypassing MongoDB filters with $facet and $lookup, and chaining the attack with Varnish caching to exfiltrate the flag.

item.title: 🐶 Puppy – HTB Writeup
item.author: mohamedmasmoudi745@gmail.com (Mohamed Masmoudi)
item.description: This is my write-up for the “Puppy” machine on HackTheBox. It covers enumerating an Active Directory environment, abusing GenericWrite and GenericAll permissions, brute-forcing a KeePass database, and enabling a disabled account to gain a foothold and retrieve the user flag.

item.title: About Me
item.author: mohamedmasmoudi745@gmail.com (Mohamed Masmoudi)
item.description:
Hi! I’m Mohamed Masmoudi (Enigma522), a cybersecurity enthusiast who loves CTFs, HackTheBox, and digging into vulnerabilities (This is some CVEs I found).
This site hosts my writeups and research. Thanks for stopping by!
Feel free to connect with me on GitHub, LinkedIn.

Interests

  • Cyber Security
  • CTF
  • Web Exploitation
  • Digital Forensics
  • Pentesting
  • Coding

Education

Software Engineering Degree, 2026
National Institute Of Applied Science And Technology, INSAT
